---
title: "Linda Mary Villari"
---

## Linda Mary Villari

**Dates:** (1836-1915)

**Maiden name:** (White)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1878-85), novelist, translator

### Biography

She married, first (1861) at Holy Trinity, Brompton, Vincenzo Costanzo Mazini, and secondly, the Italian historian Pasquale Villari (1827-1917).  She published fiction both as Linda Mazini and as Linda Villari, and also translated  works by Villari and others.

### Letters

- Letter from June 2d 1890
- Letter from May 4th [1882?][[footnote:2]]
- Letter from [1880?][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Jany 1st [1880]
- Letter from [13 June 1879]
- Letter from 26th April [1879]
- Letter from June 6th [1878]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
